name: Adbrix
description: Korean mobile attribution and analytics platform by IGAWorks with one-SDK for attribution, analytics and monetization.

seo.title: Adbrix — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Adbrix: Korean mobile attribution and analytics platform by IGAWorks with one-SDK for attribution, analytics and monetization.

when_to_use: Install attribution with one-SDK for Korean Android apps
Measuring re-engagement campaigns for Korean mobile games
In-app event tracking + analytics without multiple SDK integrations
Fraud detection for CPI campaigns targeting Korean market

pros: One SDK covers attribution, analytics and monetization
Deep integrations with Korean ad networks
Free tier available for smaller Korean apps
Real-time dashboards tuned for local campaigns
cons: Global partner coverage trails major MMPs
UI and docs assume Korean-market context
Less mature iOS SKAN tooling than competitors
Support quality varies outside Seoul hours
review.verdict: Cost-effective MMP for Korea-focused apps, but a questionable pick if you expand internationally.
review.best_for: Korean app publishers monetizing on local ad networks and needing a single-SDK stack.
review.not_for: Global apps needing enterprise SLAs and deep SKAN 4 postback tooling.

lock_in.reason: MMP attribution data tightly coupled to vendor
